title: Verify Dual-Gateway Homepage Navigation
description: Ensure the homepage displays two distinct gateways for Consumer and Business portals, and navigation buttons correctly route users to respective portals.

steps.description: Open the homepage URL
Verify the presence of 'Shop for Myself' and 'Source for Business' gateway options
Click on 'Shop for Myself' button
Confirm navigation to Consumer Portal main page
Return to homepage
Click on 'Source for Business' button
Confirm navigation to Business Portal main page

title: Complete Snack Personality Quiz and Validate Recommendations
description: Verify that the snack personality quiz completes successfully and returns accurate, relevant product recommendations tailored to user responses.

steps.description: Navigate to Consumer Portal
Start the snack personality quiz
Answer all quiz questions with valid inputs
Verify quiz completes without errors
Verify personalized product recommendations are displayed based on quiz answers

title: Validate Subscription Model Functionality
description: Check that users can subscribe with recurring delivery, receive a 15% discount, and manage subscription controls such as pause and cancel.

steps.description: Navigate to a consumer product page
Select subscription purchase option
Complete subscription checkout process
Verify 15% subscription discount is applied correctly in order summary
Access user subscription management dashboard
Pause the subscription
Confirm subscription is paused successfully
Cancel the subscription
Confirm subscription cancellation processed and user notified

title: Check Compliance Vault Certification Download and Filters
description: Verify compliance vault allows filtering certifications and lab reports and enables downloading updated documents within 2 seconds load time.

steps.description: Login as B2B user and navigate to Compliance Vault
Apply filters by certification type and date
Confirm filtered list updates correctly and promptly
Download a certification document
Verify document downloads successfully within 2 seconds

title: Business Sample Kit Order Flow Validation
description: Verify that B2B users can order $50 sample kits with input validation, payment processing, and receive automated confirmation emails including refund incentive details.

steps.description: Navigate to Business Portal sample kit order page
Fill order form with valid inputs and payment details
Check validation prevents empty or incorrect inputs
Submit the order
Verify payment is processed successfully
Verify order confirmation screen is shown
Check automated confirmation email with refund incentive is received

title: Bulk Pricing Calculator Dynamic Update and Quote Generation
description: Ensure bulk pricing calculator updates prices correctly based on quantity input and sends accurate quote emails to the user.

steps.description: Navigate to Bulk Pricing Calculator in Business Portal
Input various order quantities including edge values (minimum, maximum)
Verify pricing tiers and totals update dynamically with inputs
Request a price quote
Confirm correct quote email is received promptly

title: Real-time Order Tracking Dashboard Functionality
description: Verify order tracking dashboard shows real-time shipment status and delivers notifications for key shipment stages timely and accurately.

steps.description: Login as B2B user and open order tracking dashboard
Verify current order shipping status is accurately displayed
Simulate order shipment status updates
Confirm dashboard updates order status in real-time
Verify notification alerts for key shipment stages are sent to user

title: Private Label Configurator Mockup and Minimum Order Enforcement
description: Validate that users can customize branding options, preview accurate 3D mockups, and minimum order quantity calculators enforce limits appropriately.

steps.description: Navigate to Private Label Configurator
Upload logos and select branding options
Verify 3D mockup updates in accordance with selected options
Input various order quantities including below minimum threshold
Confirm minimum order quantity restrictions are enforced with relevant error messages
Generate and approve quote
Verify successful quote generation and approval flow

title: User Authentication and Secure Account Management
description: Test user registration, login, password reset flows, and role-based access control with email verification to ensure secure authentication and proper dashboard access.

steps.description: Attempt registration with valid email and password
Verify email verification link is sent and account is activated only after verification
Login with verified credentials
Verify successful login and redirection to appropriate dashboard (Consumer or Business) based on role
Initiate password reset with registered email
Verify password reset email is received and reset works correctly
Attempt login with invalid credentials
Verify login fails with proper error messages
Attempt access to restricted pages without proper role
Verify access is denied or redirected appropriately

title: Global Search Functionality and Performance
description: Ensure global search returns relevant results across products, recipes, and compliance documents with functional filters and autocomplete suggestions, performing within acceptable response times.

steps.description: Enter partial and full keywords in global search input
Verify relevant autocomplete suggestions appear promptly
Execute search
Confirm results include correct categories: products, recipes, compliance documents
Apply filters on search results by category
Verify results update according to selected filters
Measure and verify search results load within 500ms

title: Referral Program Tracking and Credit Application
description: Verify referral program properly tracks referrals, associates them with user accounts, and applies credits correctly in D2C consumer accounts.

steps.description: Register user A and generate referral link
Register user B using referral link
Confirm referral is recorded and linked to user A
User B completes qualifying purchase
Verify credit is applied correctly to user A's account
Check referral dashboard or credit balance for user A
Verify credit details and history are accurate

title: Performance Benchmark Testing
description: Verify platform meets performance benchmarks including page load times under 2 seconds, API response times under 500ms, and platform uptime of 99.9%.

steps.description: Load key pages: Homepage, Consumer Portal, Business Portal, Private Label Portal, Compliance Vault
Confirm each page loads in under 2 seconds on standard network conditions
Perform API calls related to product search, compliance document retrieval, order placement
Verify API response times are under 500 milliseconds
Monitor system uptime over defined testing period
Confirm uptime meets or exceeds 99.9%
